data.body:
## Description
Modify plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md Phase 2.5 (Adversarial Review) to dispatch the new dedicated agents instead of generic agents with prompt templates.

Changes to Phase 2.5 Step 1 (Red Team Dispatch):
- Replace: 'Dispatch an opus sub-agent using the red team prompt template'
- With: Dispatch via subagent_type: dso:red-team-reviewer with model: opus. The agent reads its own prompt from its agent definition. Pass epic context and story map as task arguments.

Changes to Phase 2.5 Step 2 (Blue Team Dispatch):
- Replace: 'dispatch a sonnet sub-agent using the blue team prompt template'
- With: Dispatch via subagent_type: dso:blue-team-filter with model: sonnet. Pass red team findings as task argument.

Add new Step 3.5 (Persist Adversarial Review):
- After blue team returns, write the full exchange to ARTIFACTS_DIR/adversarial-review-<epic-id>.json
- Add one-line ticket comment: '.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "Adversarial review: N findings, M accepted. Full exchange: <artifact-path>"'

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md — Edit

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Preplanning references dso:red-team-reviewer as subagent_type
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:red-team-reviewer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Preplanning references dso:blue-team-filter as subagent_type
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:blue-team-filter' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Artifact persistence step exists
  Verify: grep -q 'adversarial-review.*json' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
